description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, sbom, release, and scan, using a before_script that sets JOB_TIMESTAMP, COMMIT_HASH_SHORT, COMMIT_BRANCH_OR_TAG, REGISTRY_HOST, REGISTRY_USER, REGISTRY_PASSWORD, and REGISTRY_IMAGE, and a docker:dind service that injects a certificate if CERTIFICATE_URL is provided. In the build stage add a build job (image openjdk:17-jdk) that runs ./gradlew build and publishes the generated *.tar files and build/reports as artifacts, and a build docker image job (image docker:latest) that echoes the computed variables, logs in to $REGISTRY_HOST, builds the image with tag "$REGISTRY_IMAGE:$COMMIT_BRANCH_OR_TAG-$COMMIT_HASH_SHORT", pushes it, and echoes a push confirmation. In the sbom stage add collect SBOM (syft, docker) (image docker:latest) that logs in, pulls the image, installs curl and syft, runs syft on the Docker image outputting json and table files, and collect SBOM (syft, jar) (image ubuntu:20.04) that installs curl and syft, runs syft on the built jar files found in build/distributions, storing the results; both upload any *sbom* files as artifacts. In the release stage add push docker image (image docker:latest) that logs in, pulls the image, tags it as "$REGISTRY_IMAGE:$COMMIT_BRANCH_OR_TAG", pushes it and echoes the push, and push docker image on master as latest (image docker:latest, only on master) that logs in, pulls the image, tags it as "$REGISTRY_IMAGE", pushes it and echoes the push. In the scan stage add scan vulnerabilities (grype, docker) and scan vulnerabilities (grype, jar) (both image ubuntu:20.04) that install curl and grype, run grype on the respective SBOM files producing json and table reports, and store any *vulnerabilities* files as artifacts.
